TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: puljesek rupacunanga taicu a cemel nu venuciyar ta quljangaljangas a hana i paketjaw kata vaqu a vavuw tuki i djalananan, aza ledjeledje a sauv naicu a cemel, maqati a kakanen a kakedriyan kata maqacuvucuvung. sa aicu a cemel, napapungadananga ta "petek" mavan aza ljingaw nu namalumanga a vangelj nimatju. ljakua, pinaka a "puljesk" taicu a cemel na ramaljengmaljeng a setjavuqel uta, qadjaw a qaljeceqec aicu a cemel nu kakanen aya. cemecemel sinancemel aicu a puljesek.
S.PHON: pu é…ôs…ôk rupa ¶unaŇča tai ¶u a ¶…ôm…ô…≠ nu v…ônu ¶ijar ta qu éaŇča éaŇčas a hana i pak…ô ¶aw kata vaqu a vavuw tuki i …Ča…≠ananan, aza …≠…ô…Č…ô…≠…ô…Č…ô a sauv nai ¶u a ¶…ôm…ô…≠, maqati a kakan…ôn a kak…ô…Ėijan kata maqa ¶uvu ¶uvuŇč. sa ai ¶u a ¶…ôm…ô…≠, napapuŇčadanaŇča ta "p…ôt…ôk" mavan aza éiŇčaw nu nama…≠umaŇča a vaŇč…ô é nima ¶u. éakua, pinaka a "pu é…ôsk" tai ¶u a ¶…ôm…ô…≠ na rama é…ôŇčma é…ôŇč a s…ô ¶avuq…ô…≠ uta, qa…Čaw a qa é…ô ¶…ôq…ô ¶ ai ¶u a ¶…ôm…ô…≠ nu kakan…ôn aja. ¶…ôm…ô ¶…ôm…ô…≠ sinan ¶…ôm…ô…≠ ai ¶u a pu é…ôs…ôk.
S.FORM: puljesek rupacunanga taicu a cemel nu venuciyar ta quljangaljangas a hana i paketjaw kata vaqu a vavuw tuki i djalananan, aza ledjeledje a sauv naicu a cemel, maqati a kakanen a kakedriyan kata maqacuvucuvung. sa aicu a cemel, napapungadananga ta "petek" mavan aza ljingaw nu namalumanga a vangelj nimatju. ljakua, pinaka a "puljesk" taicu a cemel na ramaljengmaljeng a setjavuqel uta, qadjaw a qaljeceqec aicu a cemel nu kakanen aya. cemecemel sinancemel aicu a puljesek.
